buildCommand: npm install -g npm@10.9.2 && npm config set maxsockets 3 && cd server && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260705163320_init || true && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260705_supabase_auth || true && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm install -g yarn && cd ../client && yarn install && yarn build
